title: pilosella euchaetia subsp. longa
intro: Pilosella euchaetia subsp. longa is a subspecies of the Pilosella euchaetia plant, also known as a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit inflammation and reduce fever. The health benefits of Pilosella euchaetia subsp. longa include its potential to improve digestion, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
